crystcursed_dragon.gui.datapack.smooth_s: Starter Amethyst Block for new Crystcursed Dragons
§7■ Eases early-game difficulty for new Crystcursed Dragons. Place it and rest on top of it to replenish your magic source.
death.attack.dragonsurvival.crystcursed_: %1$s was sliced apart by %2$s's sweeping volley.

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.crystal_bu: §cMust be on the ground and holding a convertible item, e.g. §d"Amethyst Shard"

§7■ Decompose §bcrystalline mana§7 and infuse it into §5Amethyst Shards§7, transforming them into §dSmall Crystal Buds§7. Plant them near your Dragon Treasures; while you rest atop the hoard, dissipated mana will slowly nurture their growth.

■ §8Conversion rate per 1.5 seconds:
「Level + Random(0~1)」
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.crystcurse:
§7■ Overflowing §dmana§7 crystallizes between the dragon's scales, §aenhancing their defense§7.

§7■ When the dragon takes damage, the Crystcursed Armor gradually loses stability §cand eventually deactivates§7.

§7■ The armor only begins to regenerate §7after the dragon remains out of combat for a period of time.

§7■ §fArmor value bonus§7 and §fmaximum hits before deactivation§7 scale with skill level.

§7■ As you mature, your mastery over §bcrystalline mana§7 deepens. Mana not yet re-condensed upon your body §dswirls around you§7 like intangible blades, §6slightly enhancing your damage§7 when you attack.

§7■Summon a §bcrystalline array§7 to forge a focusing ring, forcibly gathering §bscattered mana§7 into a concentrated torrent that §4spews ruinous energy forward§7, §cscorching§7 all in its wake.

§7■The intense convergence of mana will lash back at its wielder — upon use the caster will suffer a §fbrief debilitation§7.

§7■§cOnly adult dragons§7 (growth ≥ 40) may master this furious power.
§cYour form cannot yet endure it.§7 Try again when §6adult (maturity ≥ 40)§7.

§7■ You master the compression of §bCrystalline Mana§7, increasing your §dusable mana pool§7.

§7■ You can stand on §uexternal mana sources§7 like §5Amethyst Blocks§7 or §bLapis Lazuli Blocks§7 to draw energy, converting it into a personal reserve for §dskill usage§7.
§7Only usable when §6completely stationary on the ground.

§7■ Use this ability to summon the §bMana Control Interface§7 for fine-tuning certain spell behaviors.

■§8 Requires you to be completely stationary on the ground and channeling; the panel closes if you move or stop channeling.

§7■ Condense §bSolidified Mana Crystals§7 into a missile and fire it forward.

■ Cast Form-Normal: On hit, it erupts into a §3Crystcursed Path§7 and §4detonates once the eruption ends§7.

■ Cast Form-Sneak: On hit, the missile §4instantly explodes§7 without generating a Crystcursed Path.

§8■ Path eruptions, damage, range, and explosion power scale with skill level.

§7■ Channel mana into the ground to form a path of erupting crystal spikes that pierce enemies along its length.

■ Cast Form-Normal: Unleashes a fan-shaped crystal eruptions forward.

■ Cast Form-Sneak: Erupts crystal spikes outward around you in a smaller radius.

§8■ The length, damage, and eruption range of the Crystcursed Path scale with skill level.

§7■ Decompose and gather §bcrystalline mana§7, spreading it along the ground to form a magic field, then call down a rain of crystals to strike all enemies within.

■ Cast Form-Normal: Project the mana forward to attack distant foes.

■ Cast Form-Sneak: Create the field centered on yourself to assault nearby foes.

§7■ Generate a magic field that deflects projectiles, consuming accumulated energy to §ccounterattack§7.

■ Cast Form-Normal: Deflected projectiles are sent back toward their sender.

■ Cast Form-Sneak: Deflected projectiles are redirected toward your line of sight.

■ When the cast ends in Cast Form-Normal: Fires an energy orb; explosion power scales with the number of deflections.

■ When the cast ends in Cast Form-Sneak: Grants §4"Countering Claw"§7, increasing speed and empowering your next attack. Potency scales with deflections; the effect is consumed on attack.

■ When you have more than 4 §bCrystcursed Volley Crystals§7, they will orbit around you, damaging nearby enemies.

§7■ You can perform a §2spin charge§7 in the §fair§7 or §fwater§7, accelerating your flight and damaging all units you collide with. §7To learn this skill§7, journey to the §fEnd§7 and seek the Legacy Grounds.

§7■ Cast Form - Normal: Peel crystallized mana from your body; they §7hover beside you, waiting for your attack command.

§7■ Cast Form - Sneaking: Infuse the crystals with mana, transforming them into blades that perform a §6sweeping attack§7 when you fight in melee.

■ Hold §fRight Mouse Button§7 to §6fire crystals one by one§7 toward your crosshair, applying the §3「Crystal Thorns」§7 effect to hit targets.

§7■ Press §fLeft Mouse Button§7 while firing to unleash a §6rapid volley§7 of all remaining crystals. These shots ignore the target's post-hit damage immunity, but deal 30%% less damage.

§7■ Crystal damage is further increased if you had the §c「Strength」§7 effect or a §c「Sharpness」§7-enchanted weapon equipped in the §cSword Slot§7 of your §e「Claws & Teeth」§7 before summoning the crystals.
§7■ Dragons rely on §flevitation magic§7 to §2fly§7, but few are born with this ability.
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.innate_res:
§7■ Under the curse's erosion, your magic source has spontaneously developed a §7§lbasic resistance§r§7.

§7■ This slightly slows the onset of Source Emptiness, granting the newborn dragon a fragment of hope for survival.
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.shattering:
§7■ When the dragon's health falls below 30%% and they take damage, crystals on their body §4violently shatter§7, releasing a §dshockwave§7 that knocks back nearby enemies, inflicts §5thorns damage§7, and applies §8Slowness for 3 seconds§7.

§7■ After triggering, requires §e15 seconds§7 to recharge before it can activate again.

§7■ §6Shockwave power§7 and §6knockback distance§7 scale with skill level§7.
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.source_pre: §7■ Leveling this skill §6slows source depletion§7 and increases the §acondensation efficiency§7 of §boverflowing mana§7, reducing wasteful dissipation.
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.symbiotic_:
§7■ When you rest upon a hoard of at least 5 treasure items, the mana dissipating from your body gently envelops you like a mist. This pacified energy seeks out nearby crystals, seeping into them and encouraging their growth.

■ §8The radius of influence expands with your age.
「Radius: 2~8 blocks」
dragon_penalty.dragonsurvival.source_emp:
§7■ The curse causes mana to constantly leak out and crystallize, gradually emptying your source.

§7■ When your source is empty, the §4curse continues to erode you§7, inflicting §8weakness§7, slowing mana regeneration, and accelerating §2hunger§7.

§7■ Remedies: Rest on §fAmethyst Blocks§7, use items containing §fAmethyst Shards§7/§fLapis Lazuli§7, or consume the §fCrystcursed Dragon's Treat§7 for temporary §aunlimited mana§7.
dragon_species.dragonsurvival.crystcurse:
§7■§6 Crystcursed Dragons§7 are true dragons afflicted by a crystalline curse, their mana constantly §bseeping out and crystallizing upon their scales§7. The shackles of the curse, meant to bind them, instead granted the ability to §bdecompose and reshape mana§7, turning the curse itself into a §6weapon§7.

§2■ Trait:§7 Crystcursed Magic
§4■ Cost:§7 Their magic source is bound to the curse and slowly drains over time, leaving them §fweakened§7 and §fhungrier than other dragons§7.
§6■ Diet:§7 %s

§7■ You have inherited this §3cursed bloodline§7. Faint streaks of light run between your scales, and §bcondensed mana crystals§7 sprout across your body — your §6most reliable weapons§7 and your §5inescapable shackles§7.

■ The curse lets you manipulate the crystalline mana on your skin, causing it to §bdecompose and recombine at your will§7: it can pierce foes or destabilize itself to trigger devastating explosions.

■ Yet the curse steadily erodes your magic source, bringing hunger and weakness, and may even... lead to your death. To survive, you must seek out magic-imbued items to replenish your dwindling source.
■§7Unlock the Crystal Dragon by touching amethyst items.
dragonsurvival.advancement.crystcursed\/: As a Crystcursed Dragon, kill a creature using energy gathered by deflecting projectiles.
Reach 60 growth levels as a Crystcursed Dragon.
Place mana-storing blocks—such as Amethyst Blocks—that a Crystcursed Dragon can rest on to replenish its magic source.
Fully master all passive skills of the Crystcursed Dragon.
Draw mana from crystalline sources or gain the 'Source Surge' effect to restore and stabilize your magic source.
As a Crystcursed Dragon, awaken an Amethyst Shard into a 'Small Crystal Bud' and guide its growth using dissipated mana while resting atop at least 5 Dragon Treasures.
A strange current of magic stirs
effect.crystcursed_dragon.counter_claw.d: Increases movement speed while active. Attacking consumes the buff, applying its power to your next attack as a percentage-based damage bonus.
effect.crystcursed_dragon.crystcursed_th: When the effect ends, a crystal thorn is summoned at the wearer's feet, damaging the wearer and nearby entities.
effect.crystcursed_dragon.replenish_the_: Temporarily suppresses the negative effects of the crystal curse, freeing the Crystcursed Dragon from its shackles.
effect.crystcursed_dragon.source_emptine: Increases hunger consumption rate and reduces damage dealt.
item.crystcursed_dragon.crystcursed_drag: ■§7 Temporarily grants §7§nunlimited mana§7 and §dreplenishes your magic source§7.
item.crystcursed_dragon.custom_model_ite: §dThis is a technical item — you are not meant to obtain it.
item.crystcursed_dragon.custom_module_it: §dThis is a technical item — you are not meant to obtain it.
item.crystcursed_dragon.golden_amethyst_: ■§7A staple provision for Crystcursed Dragons embarking on perilous journeys. First the whole amethyst cluster is cleft and its arcane motes are set adrift, then a fusion of gold and Elder Dragon Dust is poured into the drifting mana. When the sustaining magic is withdrawn, the Elder Dragon Dust reacts with the motes and coalesces§7 into a stable crystal with a metallic sheen. Consuming it grants damage absorption and restores vitality, and it also purges poison and wither effects.
item.crystcursed_dragon.mana_setting_men: §dThis is a technical item — you are not meant to obtain it.
